overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight exploring dark, foggy underground subway tunnels. The environment features industrial concrete architecture, graffiti, abandoned train cars, and atmospheric red and blue emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete storage room with sandbags transitioning to tunnel

events.description: character moves from small storage room into the main train tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously from a storage room into a dark tunnel while holding a flashlight and handgun

entered.detail: stack of white sandbags near the doorway
red warning light illuminating the tunnel entrance
metal railway tracks running through the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a small concrete storage area with sandbags and metal shelving, then moves through a doorway into a dark underground train tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground train tunnel with graffiti and emergency lighting

events.description: blue emergency light becomes visible on the right wall, mixing with red lighting
graffiti reading OUT OF DARKNESS appears on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the train tracks, shining the flashlight on tunnel walls and graffiti

entered.detail: white painted graffiti text on the concrete wall
vertical blue fluorescent light fixture on the wall
thick concrete columns supporting the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the narrow train tunnel illuminated by mixed red and blue emergency lighting. Graffiti becomes visible on the walls as the character explores deeper into the underground passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled tunnel section with abandoned train car

events.description: tunnel floor becomes covered with rubble and debris, tracks partially obscured
game text overlay appears reading: Find your flashlight in the Spiral

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through debris and rubble while approaching an abandoned train car

entered.detail: derelict subway car with broken windows and graffiti
pile of concrete rubble and trash on the tunnel floor
game objective text floating in the air

segments.scene_description: The tunnel becomes increasingly cluttered with debris and rubble. An abandoned train car appears on the left as the character moves through the deteriorating section, and game text appears indicating an objective.

scene_state.functional_zone: open debris field with abandoned subway cars and graffiti

events.description: large graffiti reading YOU LOST HER appears on the right wall in red and white
character crouches down to move through low debris near the train car

agents.ego_description: crouching and moving through the debris field while examining the abandoned train and wall graffiti

entered.detail: large red and white graffiti text on the concrete wall
wide area covered with rubble, trash, and broken concrete

segments.scene_description: The character explores a more open area filled with debris and an abandoned train car. Prominent graffiti reading YOU LOST HER covers the right wall. The character crouches to navigate through the rubble while the flashlight illuminates the decaying environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel end with metal barricade and blood stains

events.description: blood stains become visible on the ground near the metal barricade
character slows and stops at the blocked tunnel end, examining the gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the blocked tunnel end and examining the blood-stained barricade with flashlight

entered.detail: metal fence gate blocking the tunnel path with wooden planks
dark red blood stains on the concrete floor near the gate
caution tape wrapped around the barricade structure

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the tunnel where a metal chain-link gate blocks further progress. Blood stains on the ground and yellow police tape suggest a crime scene or dangerous area. The character stops to examine the barricade as the tunnel ends in darkness beyond the gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped storage room into a decaying, atmospheric subway tunnel. It begins in a small concrete area filled with sandbags and metal shelving before passing through a doorway into a dark underground passage bathed in red emergency light. As the character moves deeper, the lighting shifts to a mix of red and blue hues, revealing layers of graffiti across the concrete walls. The scene then transitions into a more deteriorated section of the tunnel where debris and rubble clutter the path, eventually passing an abandoned train car on the left as objective text appears on the screen.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a debris-strewn subway expanse that culminates at a grim, barricaded dead end. It begins with the character crouching through an open area of rubble and decaying concrete, where the flashlight beam catches prominent graffiti reading YOU LOST HER on the right wall. As the camera pushes forward past an abandoned train car, the open space narrows and the environment becomes increasingly claustrophobic. The scene then shifts toward the tunnel's terminus, where the path is abruptly blocked by a metal chain-link gate. Finally, the movement stops to examine the barricade, revealing blood stains on the ground and yellow police tape against a backdrop of absolute darkness beyond the gate.
